name: PROTRON ECLYPSE
comment: PROTRON ECLYPSe: The PROTRON ECLYPSE™ is a versatile high powered 1000W air cooled IPX4 outdoor rated color blinder, strobe, wash luminaire. Features include (96) 10W CREE RGBW 4-in-1 LEDs, 31° beam / 63° field angles, 27,000+ total lumen output, brilliant eye candy effects, selectable pixel mapping zones, strobe intensity, duration, rate, and FX control, super high speed (1-25fps) adjustable strobe, DMX, RDM, Kling-NET, and Art-NET protocol support, 8/16 bit RGB and RGBW smooth color mixing modes, adjustable/removable yoke bracket with 3-position holes, interlocking system for multiple unit matrix designs, IP65 3/5pin DMX, RJ45 ethernet, IP65 Locking power in/out connections, 4-button control pane with OLED menu display, and a multi-voltage universal auto switching power supply (100-240v).

gwSpecs.description: The PROTRON ECLYPSE™ is a versatile high powered 1000W air cooled IPX4 outdoor rated color blinder, strobe, wash luminaire. Features include (96) 10W CREE RGBW 4-in-1 LEDs, 31° beam / 63° field angles, 27,000+ total lumen output, brilliant eye candy effects, selectable pixel mapping zones, strobe intensity, duration, rate, and FX control, super high speed (1-25fps) adjustable strobe, DMX, RDM, Kling-NET, and Art-NET protocol support, 8/16 bit RGB and RGBW smooth color mixing modes, adjustable/removable yoke bracket with 3-position holes, interlocking system for multiple unit matrix designs, IP65 3/5pin DMX, RJ45 ethernet, IP65 Locking power in/out connections, 4-button control pane with OLED menu display, and a multi-voltage universal auto switching power supply (100-240v).
